chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA No. 473 & 474 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No. 2351/2024. (Condonation) 2. For orders on office objection No. 1 & 25. 3. For orders on CMA No. 2278/2024 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For orders on CMA No. 2279/2024 (stay) 23.01.2026. None present. These are prima facie time barred references pending since 2024 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Applicant remains unrepresented today without intimation or justification. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter, therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in the connected file. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
